headline: Do Wall Street Analysts Like Arch Capital Stock?
summary: Arch Capital has underperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Arch Capital Group (ACGL): Best Large Cap Stocks to Buy Under $100
summary: ​Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ:ACGL) is one of the best large cap stocks to buy under $100. On April 28, Arch Capital Group announced a strong start to 2026, reporting net income available to common shareholders of $1.0 billion, or $2.88 per share. This performance marks a significant increase from the $564 million reported in […]
